rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. THAI MING CHIU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Of Plaintiff Charles Lis Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 14, 2015 line 1. PLAINTIFF CHARLES LI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues DENIED. Triable issue of fact regarding judgment debtor's equitable interest in the Property prior to transfer, i.e. were the amounts provided by relatives to judgment creditor investments or loans. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: MADELYN FISH et al VS. MARIA BURLUK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-544392 WITH CASE CGC-14-539014
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 14, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANTS MARIA BURLUK and EKATERINA VENGLEVSKA's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-544392 WITH CASE CGC-14-539014 Hearing Required. Counsel for all parties in both cases to appear. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: HOWARD L WESTON AS TRUSTEE OF THE HOWAR L WESTON VS. MIMI LAY
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 14, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANTS MIMI LAY, WILLIAM LAY, DAW THAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to July 23, 2015 on Court's own motion. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: AMY TONG VS. JACK NIXON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 14, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANT JACK NIXON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Notice is sufficient per SFRO and not misleading. = (501/GLW)
